Localization.Description: The creation or attachment of a named channel specific to the Cobalt Strike software has been detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Cobalt Strike usage detected on host {event_src.host}. Pipe {object.name} was opened
The process {subject.process.fullpath} located on the ADMIN$ network share created a named pipe specific "{object.name}" to Cobalt Strike on host {event_src.host}
